home.title: Manager AI Coach
home.subtitle: A structured learning path and AI coaching system to help you navigate your team's transition to AI-augmented work.

learningPath.title: Learning Path
learningPath.description: Structured micro-skills for the AI transition, unlocked as you progress.

aiCoach.title: AI Coach
aiCoach.description: Context-aware coaching conversations tailored to your situation.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: See your growth across skills and get recommended next steps.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.initialMessage:
Hi! I'm your AI coach. I'm here to help you navigate your team's transition to AI-augmented work.

What's on your mind? You can share a specific challenge you're facing, ask about a skill you're learning, or just start a conversation about your situation.
coach.placeholder: Ask your coach anything... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
coach.limit: Limited to 20 messages per day. Responses may take a moment.
coach.newSessionMessage: Starting a new conversation. What would you like to talk about?
coach.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step1.title: What's your role?
step1.description: This helps us tailor the learning path to your situation.

middleManager.label: Middle Manager
middleManager.description: Managing team leads or multiple teams

individualContributor.label: Individual Contributor
individualContributor.description: No direct reports, but curious about AI leadership

step3.title: How familiar are you with AI tools?
step3.description: Be honest — we'll calibrate the content accordingly.

none.label: None
none.description: I haven't used AI tools in my work yet

basic.label: Basic
basic.description: I've tried a few things but don't use it regularly

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.description: I use AI tools regularly in my own work

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: I actively guide my team's AI adoption

skills.title: Skill Tree
skills.description: Complete skills to unlock new ones. Click any available skill to begin.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Access your learning path and AI coach
signIn.emailSentPrefix: We've sent a sign-in link to

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.description: A sign-in link has been sent to your email address. Click the link to continue.
